title: Freundeserver Mods
description: A modpack with recommended mods for your vanilla server with your friends.
body:
Freundeserver

This is a modpack for friends who play together on their own minecraft server.

Who is this modpack for?

This modpack is recommended for people who play with friends on their own minecraft server and want some extras. This modpack helps you to have a better and smoother gameplay and give some extra features.

Why should I download this modpack?

This modpack offers numerous advantages for Minecraft players:

  • Improved Performance: Mods like Lithium and Sodium provide more FPS and smoother gameplay.
  • Additional Info: AppleSkin and Roughly Enough Items (REI) make food and crafting recipes easier to understand.
  • Improved communication: With Simple Voice Chat you can converse seamlessly with your friends.
  • Explore the world: With Xaero's Minimap and Xaero's World Map you can keep track of the environment and the world.
  • Save bildings before griefing and optimize farms: With Open Parties and Claims you can claim your properties to protect them for griefing and forceload your farms to produce more stuff.

Which mods are included?

  • AmbientSounds for better ambient sounds.
  • AppleSkin for more information for food.
  • Bobby for more view distance and smoother gameplay.
  • Cat Eyes - Night Vision Toggle Mod (until 1.20.6) for Night Vision.
  • Clumps for better performance with XP orbs.
  • Controlling to make the Key-Bindings settings clearer.
  • Dynamic FPS for better performance when Minecraft is running in the background.
  • Entity Culling uses async path-tracing to optimize game performance.
  • ImmediatelyFast to improve the rendering performance.
  • Iris Shaders to use shaders.
  • Jade 🔍 for HUD information.
  • Light Overlay (until 1.20.6) to see if you have lit well.
  • Lithium for smoother gameplay.
  • Mod Menu to change settings of the installed mods.
  • Mouse Wheelie (until 1.20.6) for better item handling.
  • Not Enough Animations adds more third-person animations
  • Open Parties and Claim (until 1.20.6) for claiming and forceloading of chunks.
  • Roughly Enough Items (REI) for better crafting book, item/crafting recipe bookmarking and more.
  • Shulker Box Tooltip for a preview window for shulker content.
  • Simple Voice Chat to chat with your friends without any extra application. (Check mod page for installation on servers)
  • Sodium for more fps.
  • Xaero's Minimap for a minimap.
  • Xaero's World Map for a huge map of the complete world.
  • Zoomify for ingame zoom.

Library mods

  • Architectury API
  • Cloth Config API
  • CreativeCore
  • Fabric API
  • Fabric Language Kotlin
  • Forge Config API Port
  • Searchables
  • Text Placeholder API
  • >etAnotherConfigLib

Coming soon...

  • Gravestons

Information for server owners

If you host your own server, you will need to install some mods on it (some required and some optional). To install these mods you can, download the .zip file of the version you need or download the mods themselve. If you use the .zip file unzip it and copy the mods folder into your server directory (if you are asked whether existing files should be replaced or skipped, select replace).

Here is a list of the included server mods:

  • Clumps (until 1.20.6) that xp stacks together.
  • Jade 🔍 [optional, but recommended] for HUD information.
  • Lithium [optional, but recommended] to optimize the servers performance.
  • Open Parties and Claims (until 1.20.6) for claiming and forceloading of chunks.
  • Simple Voice Chat [required for voice chat] to chat with your friends without any extra application. (Check mod page for installation on servers)

Library mods

  • Fabric API [required]
  • Forge Config API Port [required]
